title: ProvisionResponse
description: Response from a provider after a provisioning request, indicating either immediate fulfillment or async processing

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this provisioning request, used for status polling and deprovisioning

offering_id.description: The offering ID that was provisioned

status.description: Current status of the provisioning request

resource_id.description: Provider-assigned resource identifier, available once provisioning completes

credentials.description: Encrypted credential bundle, included when status is 'active' and provisioning is synchronous; null when provisioning is in progress

fulfillment_proof.description: Proof that the service was provisioned as promised; null when provisioning is in progress

status_url.description: URL to poll for provisioning status (for async provisioning)

estimated_ready_seconds.description: Estimated seconds until provisioning completes (for async provisioning)

region.description: Actual region where the resource was deployed

created_at.description: Timestamp when the provisioning request was accepted (ISO 8601)

expires_at.description: Timestamp when the provisioned resource expires, null if no expiration

dashboard_url.description: URL to the provider's dashboard for this resource

CredentialBundle.description: Encrypted credentials returned to the agent, encrypted with the agent's public key

encryption_method.description: Encryption algorithm used to protect the credentials

ephemeral_public_key.description: Ephemeral public key used for Diffie-Hellman key exchange (base64url)

provider_signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the encrypted payload by the provider

FulfillmentProof.description: Cryptographic or verifiable proof that the provider fulfilled the provisioning request

health_check_url.description: URL that can be called to verify the resource is alive (for health_check type)

receipt_signature.description: Provider's Ed25519 signature over a canonical receipt (for signed_receipt type)

receipt_payload.description: Base64url-encoded canonical receipt data that was signed

retry_after_seconds.description: Suggested number of seconds before retrying (for rate-limited or transient errors)
